Localization.Description: Aggregation of events with id "PT_Avaya_Ethernet_Routing_Switch_syslog_interface_arp_inspection_check_failed": from 4th up to 100th within 5 minutes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Aggregated event. {event_src.host}: ARP packet was discarded on port {datafield1} because the IP-MAC pair was not found in DHCP binding database
